subject: WHERE  ARE YOU NOW
body:
OK , Jose ,   The gang will be here at  5:00 .   You forgot to respond , my 
Jeffrey . no write , no call     .                                    
Shall  I save you some brisket and latkes ??
Just say you are ok ,   okay ? !
 
Marcia M.  and Bruce , too   with good wishes
